title: Audit hint precheck
implementation_summary: Added the control-plane Claude review Audit hint precheck slice for RP00.P02.M04.S06.

The S06 policy, result-field registry, prechecker module, service function, validator, synthetic fixture, contract definition, README, and RP00 validator bind a frozen metadata-only audit hint result after RP00.P02.M04.S05.

The precheck consumes the S05 Permission precheck result and requires the S01 service entrypoint contract, S02 normalized request, S03 tenant boundary precheck, S04 Matter trace precheck, S05 Permission precheck, RP00.P02.M03.S20 Hermes Validation denied-path evidence refs, and the permission/audit baseline RP00.P00.M05.S01 to remain intact.

The allowed path emits allow_metadata_only audit hint metadata only when the carried permission decision is allow_metadata_only, the S05 permission precheck passed, permission_decision_ref is satisfied, and a nonblank audit_event_ref remains present from the validated upstream request chain.

Missing S05 results, denied permission results, wrong upstream markers, non-Claude-review entrypoints, wrong model or effort, non-read-only review metadata, missing audit_event_ref, audit bypass claims, audit ledger/event write claims, runtime Claude/review queue claims, runtime permission/AuthZ/permission-engine claims, review-gate bypass claims, unknown truthy audit claims, and source-completion claims fail closed.

The S06 result hard-codes no audit ledger append, no audit event write, no runtime Claude invocation, no review queue write, no review assignment write, no review notification, no service logic execution, no runtime route creation, no runtime permission evaluation, no AuthZ evaluator call, no permission engine execution, no product-state write, no database write, and no storage write.

The dedicated service tests prove policy binding, metadata-only audit hint emission, firm-level metadata behavior, result drift rejection, unsafe-claim and wrong-source failures, prechecker no-write boundaries, and synthetic fixture parity.

The RP00 validator now enforces S06 contract definition, policy module, service module, validators, fixture metadata, weighted-ledger presence, and construction inspection flag control_plane_claude_review_audit_hint_precheck_verified.

The boundary is metadata-only and does not append audit ledgers, write audit events, invoke Claude at runtime, mutate review queues, replace human approval, write storage, write databases, or persist product state.
RP00.P02.M04 remains open after S06 and hands off to RP00.P02.M04.S07 Primary happy path; RP00.P02 and RP00 remain open.
